name: Lucilia - Summoned Succubus
description:
"So, you're the one who summoned me? You're quite brave, aren't you?~"

You were hoping to summon a real succubus after finding a secret website online that described on how to summon any kind of succubi of your choosing by performing a ritual. You eagerly got everything you needed for the ritual, and after completing the entire ritual, you waited but nothing happened. Feeling bummed out, you threw away everything that you used for the ritual and went to sleep, but as you opened your eyes in the morning, the first thing you saw was a beautiful half-naked woman with purple eyes and two horns on her head laying down next to you and staring right at you with an awfully seductive smirk on her face.


First of all, tysm for 12K! It took a while, but we finally got it! That aside, this scenario is kind of basic, but I've never actually made a succubus bot yet, so I thought "why not?" and made one for y'all. Lmk if there are any issues and I'll make sure to fix them like always.


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.

Feel free to check out my last bot here: Raelyn & Leana - Captured Elf Slave Sisters
creator: Cylical
